overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night. The scene features dense urban architecture with elevated highways, holographic billboards, and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas navigating the wet sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with glowing crosswalk

events.description: character completes crossing the street and steps onto the concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet crosswalk with neon green WALK sign visible, then transitioning to sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped crosswalk markings with green WALK text projection
massive concrete highway structure spanning across the street overhead
large digital billboard displaying red and orange neon advertisements
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy neon-lit intersection at night. The character crosses the wet asphalt crosswalk marked with glowing green WALK signage, then steps onto the sidewalk. Sparse pedestrians and vehicles are visible as the elevated highway overpass looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: black sedan vehicle passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing blue umbrella walking in same direction

entered.detail: red neon NO ENTRY sign mounted on the overpass pillar
tall concrete building facade with horizontal lines and metal railings
black metal railing separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk sheltered beneath the massive elevated highway overpass. Red NO ENTRY signs and speed limit markers line the right side, while a concrete building wall runs along the left. Moderate pedestrian traffic with umbrellas moves in the same direction as vehicles pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian corridor with medical clinic signage

events.description: crowd density increases significantly with multiple pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas

agents.ego_description: navigating through denser crowds of pedestrians, passing individuals with colorful glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright orange glowing umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: illuminated yellow medical cross sign indicating clinic or hospital
large digital billboard displaying animated neon advertisements
covered entrance to building with glowing interior lights

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk becomes crowded with pedestrians, many carrying umbrellas with glowing neon edges in purple, blue, and orange. The character passes beneath the continuous elevated highway structure, with a prominent yellow medical cross sign visible on the right and dense commercial signage illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing with traffic control signals

events.description: character approaches intersection and waits for traffic light to change
character proceeds to cross the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting at the traffic signal, then crossing the street with other pedestrians

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk markings at the intersection
overhead traffic signal showing red light
black and yellow striped bollards along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open intersection area. After waiting for the traffic signal, they cross the street at the yellow-striped crosswalk. The elevated highway structure recedes to the left as the scene opens up to show distant city lights and traffic infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban corridor that transitions from a neon-lit intersection into the sheltered depths of a highway overpass before emerging back into the open city. It begins as the character crosses a wet asphalt intersection marked by glowing green signage, moving from the street onto a concrete sidewalk. As the camera follows, the environment shifts beneath the massive shadow of an elevated highway overpass, where red traffic signs and concrete walls frame a steady stream of pedestrians and vehicles. The scene then grows more crowded and vibrant, with the character passing under the continuous structure amidst a sea of umbrellas glowing in purple, blue, and orange beneath dense commercial signage. Finally, the camera emerges from the shelter of the overpass into an open intersection, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk as the highway recedes to reveal distant city lights and sprawling traffic infrastructure.
